# Claude for PowerPoint

> AI Registry entry [AIR-63](https://linear.app/janusd/issue/AIR-63/claude-for-powerpoint) — status **Evaluating** as of 2026-04-20. Departments: marketing.

**Category:** AI-Powered Content Creation / Presentation Generation
**Cost:** Included with Claude Teams/Enterprise
**Departments:** Marketing
**Assignee:** Michael Bruck

## Overview

Anthropic's AI-powered presentation generation. Create PowerPoint decks through natural language conversation. Leverages Claude's writing/reasoning capabilities for structured, well-designed presentations. Comparator: Gamma (AIR-26).

## Capabilities

* Natural language → complete PowerPoint deck
* Content structuring with hierarchy
* Quality writing (Claude-powered)
* Iterative conversational refinement
* Template awareness with brand styles
* Data visualisation, charts
* Speaker notes generation

## Integrations

* Claude.ai (web, desktop)
* Microsoft PowerPoint (.pptx output)
* Part of Claude ecosystem (AIR-10, AIR-11, AIR-13, AIR-30, AIR-81)

## Strategic Advantage

No incremental cost (included in Claude subscription) vs standalone Gamma. No new vendor onboarding — Claude already Core Infrastructure.

*Evaluating. Functional tier. Comparison evaluation with Gamma (AIR-26).*
